decisions.rationale: Observation matches its own base_record_id entity_mta-nyct, which already exists in the registry with entity_name 'MTA New York City Transit' and entity_type 'agency'. The observation already resolves to that canonical record — no different record to link to.

Observation matches its own base_record_id entity_nyc-dot, which already exists in the registry with entity_name 'New York City Department of Transportation' and entity_type 'agency'. The observation already resolves to that canonical record — no different record to link to.

Observation matches its own base_record_id entity_manhattan-cb3-2010, which already exists in the registry with entity_name 'Manhattan Community Board 3', entity_type 'community board', and description 'Community Board 3 Transportation Committee'. The observation already resolves to that canonical record — no different record to link to.
